attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
1 AS BATCH_ID
,CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.RECEIVABLES_TRX_ID
, CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.LAST_UPDATED_BY
, CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE
, CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
, CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.CREATION_DATE
, CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.CREATED_BY
, CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.NAME
, CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.CODE_COMBINATION_ID
, CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID
, CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.DESCRIPTION
, CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.STATUS
, CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.TYPE_CODE
, CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.START_DATE_ACTIVE
, CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.END_DATE_ACTIVE
, CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.DEFAULT_ACCTG_DISTRIBUTION_SET
, CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.INACTIVE_DATE
, CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY
, CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.ATTRIBUTE1
, CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.ATTRIBUTE2
, CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.ATTRIBUTE3
, CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.ATTRIBUTE4
, CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.ATTRIBUTE5
, CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.ATTRIBUTE6
, CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.ATTRIBUTE7
, CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.ATTRIBUTE8
, CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.ATTRIBUTE9
, CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.ATTRIBUTE10
, CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.ATTRIBUTE11
, CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.ATTRIBUTE12
, CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.ATTRIBUTE13
, CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.ATTRIBUTE14
, CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.ATTRIBUTE15
, CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.ORG_ID
, CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE1
, CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE2
, CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE3
, CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE4
, CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE5
, CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE6
, CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE7
, CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE8
, CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE9
, CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE10
, CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE11
, CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE12
, CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE13
, CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE14
, CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE15
, CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE16
, CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE17
, CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE18
, CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE19
, CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY
, CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE20
, CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.ASSET_TAX_CODE
, CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.LIABILITY_TAX_CODE
, CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.GL_ACCOUNT_SOURCE
, CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.TAX_CODE_SOURCE
, CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.TAX_RECOVERABLE_FLAG
, CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.ACCOUNTING_AFFECT_FLAG
, CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.RISK_ELIMINATION_DAYS
, CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME
, 'CDC'AS GLOBAL_NAME  
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  AS CREATE_DATETIME               
,'I' as ACTION_CODE
FROM
(
SELECT * FROM $$NRTACCUMVWDB.CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL
WHERE ORG_ID NOT IN (SELECT ORG_ID FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_CG1_ENABLED_ORG)
AND SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= '$$LastExtractDate' 
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY RECEIVABLES_TRX_ID ,ORG_ID ORDER BY REFRESH_DATETIME DESC)=1
)CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL
WHERE CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.SOURCE_DML_TYPE <> 'DELETE'
